title: Unique 33240EU - Eco-Friendly Square Paper Plates - 18 cm - Gold Colour - 16 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Pack of 16 Square Gold Party Plates
Square paper plates measure approximately 18 cm x 18 cm
Ideal for serving cake at a birthday party or Christmas party
Combine with other gold party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Make your after party clean-up simple without sacrificing style when you use these square gold paper plates. Convenient for serving small party foods, cake, and other desserts, these eco-friendly gold plates are ideal for your wedding, new years party, golden wedding anniversary party, or Christmas party. Disposable plates make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
